characters.appearance: Older woman, approximately 60-70 years old, with a slim build and a tanned complexion. She has short, straight blonde hair and visible facial wrinkles. She wears silver hoop earrings and multiple rings.
characters.wardrobe: A loose-fitting, white long-sleeve blouse with a v-neck and blue denim jeans. She accessorizes with multiple silver bracelets on her left wrist.
characters.demeanor: Enthusiastic, expressive, and authoritative, using frequent hand gestures to emphasize her points.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: English सीखने का सबसे पहला rule? Grammar के rules रटना बंद करो! [The first rule to learn English? Stop memorizing grammar rules!]
Character A says: असली English तब आती है जब आप रोज़मर्रा की situations में बात करते हो। [Real English comes when you talk in everyday situations.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by challenging traditional learning methods.
- Establishes a practical, relatable problem (memorizing grammar doesn't work).
- Sets a warm, authoritative "older sibling" tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: English सीखने का सबसे पहला rule? Grammar के rules रटना बंद करो! असली English तब आती है जब आप रोज़मर्रा की situations में बात करते हो।

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: और यहीं Supernova का AI tutor आपकी मदद करता है। [And this is where Supernova's AI tutor helps you.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the core solution (Supernova's AI tutor).
- Shifts the focus from the problem to actionable practice.
- Bridges the hook to the product benefits.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: और यहीं Supernova का AI tutor आपकी मदद करता है।

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: आप बिना डरे, रोज़ practice कर सकते हो। [You can practice daily, without fear.]
Character A says: Interview हो या office, आपकी fluency अपने आप बढ़ेगी। [Whether it's an interview or the office, your fluency will increase automatically.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights practical benefits (fearless daily practice, real-world readiness).
- Replaces aggressive hype with encouraging, realistic outcomes.
- Builds confidence in the learner.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: आप बिना डरे, रोज़ practice कर सकते हो। Interview हो या office, आपकी fluency अपने आप बढ़ेगी।

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: तो सोचना क्या? [So why overthink?]
Character A says: आज ही Supernova app download करो। [Download the Supernova app today.]
Character A says: S-U-P-E-R-N-O-V-A. [S-U-P-E-R-N-O-V-A.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a clear, friendly call to action.
- Reinforces brand recall by spelling out the app name.
- Ends on a warm, encouraging note.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: तो सोचना क्या? आज ही Supernova app download करो। S-U-P-E-R-N-O-V-A.
